def negative_fallback_branch_swallows_invariant_violation_and_returns_plausible_default():
    rule_id = "fallback_branch_swallows_invariant_violation_and_returns_plausible_default"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag fallback logic that hides broken invariants by returning believable defaults."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
